name: python3-mock
title: python3-mock
description:
Mocking and Testing Library (Python3 version)
mock provides a core mock.Mock class that is intended to reduce the
need to create a host of trivial stubs throughout your test suite.
After performing an action, you can make assertions about which methods
/ attributes were used and arguments they were called with. You can
also specify return values and set specific attributes in the normal
way.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-mock because Mocking and Testing Library (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-mock as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-mock with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-mock --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
